readings.Aries: Forward movement is your default. Just confirm that forward is still the right direction. Let this one be easy.
readings.Taurus: Your care for the physical world — spaces, objects, bodies — is a form of love. Extend it inward. The first instinct was right.
readings.Gemini: Your nervous system processes faster than most. Give yourself time to integrate before you act. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Cancer: You withdraw when hurt in a way that looks like peace. The people who care about you can see the difference. This is a better week for listening than speaking.
readings.Leo: Something you dismissed as vanity is actually self-knowledge. Let yourself have it. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Virgo: The work is excellent. The person doing the work has needs that the work doesn't meet. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Libra: Someone is ready to hear your honest assessment. They've been waiting for you to trust them with it. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Scorpio: Something you've been holding as a vulnerability is actually a source of power. Reframe it. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Sagittarius: Your optimism is accurate. It is also sometimes premature. Check the current conditions. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Capricorn: The relationship you've been treating like a project is actually a relationship. Adjust accordingly. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Aquarius: You are ahead of the moment you're in. Come back and meet it. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Pisces: There is beauty in what's in front of you that you've been too inside it to see. Step back. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
